name: Eroad Limited
analysis: ERD has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 67% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.8800, stop A$0.7871, target A$1.1450 (2.85:1) — then trail it.
